figures.caption: Table 5: Full ablation under rotation drift (N=50, 10 seeds, medians). Bold = best per column.

Table 1: Ablation study on the paraboloid, 10 seeds, medians reported. Bold = best per column. ∗∗p<0.01 vs. baseline, paired Wilcoxon test. E : tangent-space fidelity; Eb, EΛ: true end-to-end ambient drift and covariance errors from the full pipeline. F and C coincide at MB D=201: without tangent alignment, both collapse across all 10 seeds to a degenerate chart with near-zero decoder-Jacobian singular values, underscoring the need for the tangent-bundle penalty.
Figure 1: Reconstruction error vs extrapolation distance δ beyond the [−1, 1]2 training domain (D=11, 10 seeds, mean ± std). T+F extrapolates best on all four surfaces.
Table 6: Full ablation under MB Langevin (N=200, 10 seeds, medians). Bold = best per column.

Table 3: Per-pair MFPT error (%) under MB Langevin (N=200, δ-net landmarks, 10 seeds, median). Only W0→W1 and W0→W2 reported, since all trajectories start at W0. Bold = lowest error per row. ∗p<0.05 vs. baseline, one-sided paired Wilcoxon with common noise.
